title: populus × berolinensis
intro: Populus × berolinensis, also known as the Berliner linden, is a hybrid of the white linden (Tilia alba) and the small-leaved linden (Tilia cordata), created through interspecific breeding. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a natural remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Populus × berolinensis include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory problems and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Populus × berolinensis can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to create calming and soothing products such as tinctures, salves, and essential oils.
